attacking_style: Rarely attacks independently; relies on consistent pacing and time trialing to gain GC positions rather than explosive accelerations. When attacking, fades quickly on steep gradients (Tour de Suisse 2023, Vuelta 2019).
team_tactics: Deployed as protected GC rider with dedicated tempo setting (FABBRO at Vuelta 2022) or as super-domestique doing downhill/flat pacing. Teams prioritize his TT capabilities over mountain support when GC ambitions remain viable.
terrain_preference: Strong time trialist who gains positions in ITTs (Giro 2020 podium, Vuelta 2018 to 52s). Handles moderate climbs and technical descents competently but exposed on steepest gradients (Los Machucos, Turini) and multi-climb stages.
vulnerability: Collapses on steepest gradients lacking explosive acceleration to follow elite climbers. Multi-climb formats expose recovery deficits. Loses time in final kilometers unable to respond to late accelerations. Concentration lapses cause crashes (Tirreno 2023).
key_patterns: Gains GC positions via strong time trialing when fresh, moved to podium in both Giro 2020 and Vuelta 2018
Exploits breakaway infiltration when outside top-20, gained 14+ positions to 6th at Vuelta 2022
Consistent pacing outlasts fading rivals on sustained climbs but cannot follow attacks on steep finishes
Dropped on steepest gradients repeatedly: Los Machucos, Turini, Tour de Suisse steep ramps
Form builds mid-race in Grand Tours, top-6 Vuelta 2022, podium Giro 2020 via ITT
Requires team support in critical moments, relied on MAJKA at Tirreno 2020
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows domestique relegation at Tour (leading for Van Aert), crash from concentration lapse, and fading attacks lacking explosive punch
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
